phases.description: Excellent break-away! Club is moving away from the ball smoothly with proper wrist hinge.
Great mid backswing position! Arms are extended and club is on plane.
Excellent late backswing! Shoulders are turning well with good hip resistance.
Club is too short at the top. You need more shoulder turn for power.
Excellent early downswing! Hips are clearing ahead of the shoulders.
Early release of the club. This causes loss of power and accuracy.
Slight flip at impact. Hands should lead the clubhead through contact.
Chicken-wing forming in follow-through. Let your arms extend fully.
Incomplete finish. Chest should face target with belt buckle pointing left.
